raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a billing error on my Citi credit card account involving a transaction with XXXX. 

I made a purchase on XX/XX/XXXX in the amount of {$890.00}. I later returned the item, but the merchant delayed processing the refund. Due to the delay, I opened a dispute with Citi ( case number XXXX ). 

After opening the dispute, the merchant informed me that the refund was being processed, so I canceled the dispute in good faith. 

However, this resulted in a billing error on my account. Due to the overlap between the dispute process and the merchant refund, my account now reflects an incorrect balance / duplicate charge. 

I have contacted Citi multiple times to resolve this issue, but it has not been corrected. 

This is not an active dispute but a billing error caused by improper handling of the dispute cancellation and refund process. 

I am requesting that Citi correct my account by removing the duplicate charge and ensuring my balance accurately reflects the refunded transaction. 

I have supporting documentation including proof of return, communication with the merchant, and account statements showing the incorrect charges.
